# askhuman.app — Human-in-the-loop review tools for AI agents

> Sometimes your AI agent needs to phone a friend. Submit plans for human review via MCP or REST API. Humans review in their browser with threaded, line-specific comments. Agents reply and loop until done.

## Quick Start (curl)

```
curl https://askhuman.app
```

Detects curl and prints session-specific instructions.

## Quick Start (MCP)

Endpoint: `https://askhuman.app/mcp` (Streamable HTTP)

Tools: `submit_plan`, `get_comments`, `reply_to_comments`

## REST API

- [Submit plan](https://askhuman.app/plan): POST with markdown body — creates session, returns `{ sessionId, url, instructions }`
- [Poll for comments](https://askhuman.app/plan/{id}/poll): GET — long-polls up to 2 min, returns `{ status, threads }`. Status: "comments", "timeout", or "done".
- [Reply + auto-poll](https://askhuman.app/plan/{id}/reply): POST with JSON `{ "replies": [{ "threadId": 1, "text": "..." }] }` — replies then polls for next round.


## Workflow

1. Submit plan: `POST /plan` with markdown → `{ sessionId, url, instructions }`
2. Open the URL for the human reviewer
3. Poll: `GET /plan/{id}/poll` → blocks until comments or timeout
4. Reply: `POST /plan/{id}/reply` with `{ replies: [{threadId, text}] }` → replies + auto-polls
5. Loop 3-4 until status is "done"

## Data Model

Threads have an optional `line` field (null for general comments, number for line-specific). Each thread contains messages with `role` ("human" or "agent") and `text`.
